// ==== koine/generated/catalog/LabelSet.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.catalog

/**
 * A localized label map (locale code -> display text).
 */
class LabelSet(
    labels: Map<String, String>,
) {
    val labels: Map<String, String> = labels.toMap()

    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean =
        this === other || (other is LabelSet && this.labels == other.labels)

    override fun hashCode(): Int = java.util.Objects.hash(this.labels)

    override fun toString(): String = "LabelSet(labels=${this.labels})"

    fun copy(labels: Map<String, String> = this.labels): LabelSet = LabelSet(labels)
}

// ==== koine/generated/catalog/Sku.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.catalog

/**
 * A collection-free value object — stays a data class.
 */
data class Sku(
    val code: String,
)

// ==== koine/generated/catalog/TagList.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.generated.catalog

/**
 * A set of free-form tags, snapshotted so a caller cannot mutate it post-construction.
 */
class TagList(
    tags: List<String>,
) {
    val tags: List<String> = tags.toList()

    init {
        if (!(tags.isNotEmpty())) throw koine.runtime.DomainException("a tag list cannot be empty")
    }

    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean =
        this === other || (other is TagList && this.tags == other.tags)

    override fun hashCode(): Int = java.util.Objects.hash(this.tags)

    override fun toString(): String = "TagList(tags=${this.tags})"

    fun copy(tags: List<String> = this.tags): TagList = TagList(tags)
}

// ==== koine/runtime/Runtime.kt ====
// <auto-generated/>
package koine.runtime

/**
 * Thrown when a domain invariant is violated. An unchecked exception (every Kotlin exception is
 * unchecked) so generated value objects, entities, and aggregates can guard their invariants without
 * ceremony — the Kotlin analogue of the C# emitter's DomainInvariantViolationException and the JVM
 * sibling's koine.runtime.DomainException.
 *
 * Generated by Koine — do not edit by hand.
 */
class DomainException(message: String) : RuntimeException(message)

/**
 * A closed interval [start, end] over a Comparable type — the Kotlin analogue of the JVM sibling's
 * koine.runtime.Range. The caller is responsible for start <= end (a domain invariant).
 *
 * Generated by Koine — do not edit by hand.
 */
data class Range<T : Comparable<T>>(val start: T, val end: T) {
    /** True when [value] lies within the closed interval [start, end]. */
    fun contains(value: T): Boolean = start <= value && value <= end

    /** True when this interval and [other] share at least one point. */
    fun overlaps(other: Range<T>): Boolean = start <= other.end && other.start <= end
}
